{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212203069E484589A0369C5D9CD1"}"},"total":64},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7471492948782695230","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"双线叙事,百灵鸟和V两条线给人一种惊艳的感觉，建议先玩完往日之影之后再看，给小鸟一种新的生活。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739596450,"group_id":"7386172257002851353","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在校学生对小说比较有兴趣","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/M52Nn88lETBufgb8wLuZOAftD5WGEzbCpvCCqy57vq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f8dff85a35e4401b9309d9a8fe8778a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616321&x-signature=8OZzdICLAYU1lY9ifudh0lyX6xk%3D","user_id":"1482556308461214","user_name":"紫色的比目鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1482556308461214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386172257002851353","book_info":{"abstract":"【赛博朋克】+【橘子】+【满级大佬回到新生村】
　　女v，cp百灵鸟。
        本文不走无敌流！也不是无脑爽。
---------
 　　最强雇佣兵回到了改变命运的那一天。面对朋友们相继死亡的悲惨命运，v发誓这次要拯救所有人。
　　随着v的朋友陆续回归，她的威名响彻夜之城，带起了一阵变革的旋风。
　　--第二版--
　　因一起委托，v面临死亡。为了活命，她挣扎半年，接受了无数空头支票，在生命的最后时刻重回过去，来到一切都还为开始的一天。
　　数着手里的空头支票，v循着数追了过去。
　　直到追债追到某被黑墙侵蚀的骗子黑客身上。
　　对着前联情局资深特工，v微微一笑。
       “救了你，姐姐可得给我打工了。”
　　女郎轻佻的勾起紫发女人的下巴，调笑着凑得很近。
　　对着近在咫尺的灿烂笑唇，宋昭美脸红红的倾身啄了一下。
　　紫发女人脉脉含情的看着v，“好好好。都听你的，娃娃脸。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe40152f99a452c0676feec57209dcf06~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"鱼瓜瓜1","author_id":"","book_id":"7386172257002851353","book_name":"猫吃鸟：我在赛博朋克重生了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183868","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7386174280515469849","read_count":"468","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"758360"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"313","tags":"双女主,重生,二次元,同人,赛博朋克,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6c71296bc75bb9b73caadd1d64adb69c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285786&x-signature=3vo84t4d8BxzHaOOoh7ormlS1G4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98114497086","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"318"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212203069E484589A0369C5D9CD1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2 作者太太加油。不要断更。你是最棒的宝宝[笑]","text_exts":[{"e":45,"s":41,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741017869C5D9CD1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227407451296735068953%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227386172257002851353%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724684882,"group_id":"7386172257002851353","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"历历浮生，无非败而后立。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/4zncNA3GuaZj80CqaW9kaFofdStYoyUBedy03ra5Df","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1311286cc493414cabffa1bfca351c8b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623955&x-signature=c3IVb%2FsSt1%2FB60gKyyAnoWhK0As%3D","user_id":"2335008493414782","user_name":"急急如律令令的阿华"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2335008493414782","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386172257002851353","book_info":{"abstract":"【赛博朋克】+【橘子】+【满级大佬回到新生村】
